nasb.text: Or if it is known that the ox was previously in the habit of goring, yet its owner has not confined it, he shall surely pay ox for ox, and the dead animal shall become his.

esv.text: Or if it is known that the ox has been accustomed to gore in the past, and its owner has not kept it in, he shall repay ox for ox, and the dead beast shall be his.

cnv.text: 如果人知道那牛以前常常觸人，牛主竟不把牛拴好，他必須賠償，以牛還牛，死的可以歸自己。”

ccb.text: 倘若素知牛好抵，主人却没有拴好它，他就要以牛还牛，死牛则归他。
